$MELI over the last 5 years:

• Revenue +627%
• Stock Price +5%

The market spent five years compressing the multiple while the business became one of the most dominant commerce and fintech platforms in Latin America.

$NVDA went from $4B to $130B in operating income in less than three years.

That is what it looks like when you sit at the center of a generational infrastructure cycle.

Jensen Huang says CUDA became $NVDA real moat because it runs on 100M+ systems & is embedded everywhere developers build across cloud, enterprise & research.

In an AI economy defined by scale, CUDA turns usage into lock-in & lock-in into accelerating demand for Nvidia compute.

$AMZN is now trading at its lowest valuation in more than a decade. 

We ArE sO iN a BuBbLe.

$HOOD at IPO (July 2021):
• $38/share
• 11M funded accounts
• $44B assets under custody
• $713M annual revenue
• Unprofitable

$HOOD today:
• $66/share
• 27M funded accounts
• $322B assets under custody
• $4.4B annual revenue
• ~2.1B gross profit run-rate

Up just 74% from the IPO price despite revenue growing more than 6x, assets under custody growing more than 7x & the business now being profitable.
These are meant to be 2027 earning multiples

ThE mArKeT iS iN sUcH a BuBbLe

Yet here are the 2027 multiples for some of the largest companies in the world:

• $AMZN ~21x
• $MSFT ~19x

The Implicate Order is the portfolio

The Macro Tourist sees separate assets. The Fractal    Mathematician sees one movement

The Hedgeye way is crushing everyone.

Example..all the talking heads on CNBC Half time report- they constantly recommend stocks....the stocks go down double digits..when asked about them....they always say....we bought those shares...way lower....ages ago.

I call Bull-Shit!

I like shorting. Maybe that’s the result of being with Wall Street firms for 35 years Citi,  Morgan Stanley, Wells…I developed a contempt for stocks. Those outfits can’t shine Hedgeye’shoes. This  last week a rough one?  I was up  650 bps. I’d say that was 1/3 my doing, 2/3 KM
Hedgeye’s insights have helped my mostly retired clients outperform any balanced benchmark YTD.  Yes, yes, Keith, I known YTD is less relevant. Ok, then, from the last cycle high too (2021 to now)!

Need our ETF Pro Shorts?

Instead of finally realizing there are "risks" to the US Stock Market and abroad... 

Our community has been short these for 34-149 days

I’d love $spx $spy 2%-4% lower into Tuesday to play the bounce. Oscillator went out -42 I’d love -70. I’d get to tier#2 Bos and use my swing trade account for a big bounce.  Sell puts buy calls.  But what I want and how it plays out aren’t always right. So multiple plans and preparation helps

Fasting teaches you one thing:

Discomfort is not danger.

The urge to eat is not hunger. The urge to sell is not wisdom.

Markets reward those who sit with uncertainty. So does fasting.

Discipline isn't the absence of impulse. It's the choice not to act on it.

February payrolls: -92,000.
Unemployment: 4.5%.

The labor market cracked while everyone watched oil.

A cracked labor market + rising rates + slowing growth.

That's not a soft landing. That's three warning signs firing at once.

$SPY $QQQ

I lost 100 pounds.

No trainer. 

No pill. 

No surgery.

Fasting.

Intermittent → OMAD → 48 hrs → 72 hrs → 9 days without food.

In my 40s.

Strengthened my body. 

Sharpened my mind.

I will not relent. 

You shouldn’t either.

Do not fucking relent.

You are stronger.
